_comment: IMP-216 eval input for /challenge: a pre-mortem finding grounded in verbatim raw input. The runtime validates the quote, tags origin challenge, writes challenge_report.md, and refreshes knowledge_state. Distinct from this fixture's scrutiny.json so the two agentic passes are exercised independently.

gaps.question: Where do ticket volume, resolution time, and backlog ageing come from, and how fresh must they be for a weekly review to be trustworthy?
gaps.evidence: ticket volume, resolution time, and backlog ageing in one screen
gaps.description: The three metrics are named but their source system and freshness are unstated; at review time stale or missing data would silently mislead the staffing decision.

premortem: Six weeks in, a team lead made a staffing call on backlog ageing that was three days stale because the source feed had silently stopped.
assumptions_inverted: Assumed the three metrics share one trustworthy real-time source; inverted, they may come from disparate exports with different refresh cadences.
